ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exams" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the exam */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the exam */,
  "class_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of class IDs attending the exam */,
  "exam_type" TEXT /* Type of exam (e.g., Practical, Written) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the exam in minutes */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time when students should report for the exam */,
  "exam_time" TEXT /* Time when the exam starts */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the exam is held */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Special notes or instructions for the exam */,
  "exam_level" TEXT /* Level of the exam (e.g., Mid-term, Final, Practice) */,
  "exam_year" INTEGER /* Academic year of the exam */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the exam */,
  "is_continuous" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the exam is continuous (i.e., no breaks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_class_ids FOREIGN KEY ("class_ids") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_venue FOREIGN KEY ("venue") REFERENCES venues ("venue_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher in charge of the class */,
  "class_size" INTEGER /* Number of students in the class */,
  "class_level" TEXT /* Level of the class (e.g., Grade 10, Grade 11) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the teacher belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the teacher */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "is_accessible" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the venue is accessible for students with disabilities */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the venue (e.g., air conditioning, projector) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_shifts" (
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shift */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam this shift is for */,
  "shift_number" INTEGER /* Number of the shift */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the shift */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the shift */,
  "quarantine_start" TEXT /* Start time of quarantine period */,
  "quarantine_end" TEXT /* End time of quarantine period */,
  "break_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the break between shifts, if any */,
  "staff_required" INTEGER /* Number of staff required for the shift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_shifts_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam this note is for */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional note or instruction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_notes_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam this attendance record is for */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the student */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Time the student checked in */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Time the student checked out (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "class_id" TEXT /* ID of the class the student is in */,
  "special_needs" TEXT /* Special needs or accommodations for the student */,
  "parent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the student's parent or guardian */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions the student has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam result */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam this result is for */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved in the exam */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade achieved in the exam */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the teacher on the student's performance */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the result is final */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam report */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam this report is for */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_reports_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)
